channel.title: Openvpn on sanntid.org
channel.description: Recent content in Openvpn on sanntid.org

item.title: OpenVPN server on RT-N66u
item.author: arnulf.heimsbakk@gmail.com (Arnulf Heimsbakk)
item.description:
Prerequisite RT-N66u with Tomato by Shibby firmware.

Configuring OpenVPN on the home router is a practical way to access the home network from anywhere. In addition to get access of all equipment at home it is a way to securely surfing on insecure Wi-Fi networks on Cafés.
